title: Command Palette Inspector
concept: A tabbed WordPress Playground workspace where the command palette is the first screen and primary discovery model. Actions resolve into a light inspector that shows the exact inputs, constraints, destructive consequences, progress, and resulting saved or portable state.
focus: right-side inspector for route-specific forms and warnings
dark diagnostics surface with light content cards
tabbed workspace for site, manager, gallery, saved, and transfer surfaces
flows: Select a launch source from the command index, including Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, or zip import.
Save a temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a local directory, with separate progress and different resulting states.
Manage saved Playgrounds with current unsaved state, saved identity, rename, delete, and browser-storage consequences visible.
Use Site Manager tabs for settings reset/reload, file browser, blueprint bundle, database tools, and logs.
Browse, filter, search, inspect, and run Blueprint gallery entries while acknowledging the 43-entry catalog.
Export to GitHub, download a zip, import from GitHub, import zip, and run Blueprint URL from a transfer workspace.
featureCoverage: destructive reset and saved reload messaging
file browser create folder/file upload browse and code editing
database driver path size download Adminer phpMyAdmin
